checkpoints.title: Clue 1
checkpoints.clue: Start where the old farm road opens to the sky. Grandpa always said every good adventure begins at the gate.
checkpoints.hint: Look for the outdoor entrance where visitors would first step onto the property.

checkpoints.title: Clue 2
checkpoints.clue: The next note waits near the tree that gave summer its sweetest shade.
checkpoints.hint: Find a large outdoor tree with room to gather beneath it.

checkpoints.title: Clue 3
checkpoints.clue: Follow the breeze to the path where Grandpa listened for the old windmill.
checkpoints.hint: Look for an open walking path or corner where wind would be strongest.

checkpoints.title: Treasure
checkpoints.clue: One final game. The treasure waits where the trail feels brightest.
checkpoints.hint: Head to the final sunny outdoor spot and tap Found It when you arrive.

adventureMode.title: Adventure Mode
adventureMode.subtitle: Generate a route from where you stand

stickers.name: Gift Box
stickers.description: A cheerful reward for finishing an easy route.

stickers.name: Crown
stickers.description: A rarer prize for medium and hard adventures.

stickers.name: Gem
stickers.description: A sparkling reward for harder treasure trails.

stickers.name: Wand
stickers.description: A playful sticker for adventurous explorers.

stickers.name: Treasure Map
stickers.description: An explorer reward found during Adventure Mode routes.

stickers.name: Compass
stickers.description: Unlocked when you trust your heading and keep walking.

stickers.name: Trophy
stickers.description: Reserved for strong performances on medium and hard runs.

stickers.name: Lucky Star
stickers.description: A rarer sticker that shows up more often on hard mode.

stickers.name: Silver Key
stickers.description: A hard-mode prize for committed treasure hunters.

stickers.name: Grandpa's Candy
stickers.description: A sweet keepsake unlocked by completing Story Mode for the first time.

howToPlaySteps: If selecting adventure mode, choose a difficulty.
When you reach the target location, click Found It to confirm.
Continue until the final target has been found.
uiText.permissionsBody: Precise location lets the app verify clues within a fair radius and keeps the compass guidance useful outdoors.
uiText.approximateBody: You can still continue with approximate location, but target checks become more lenient and the experience is less precise.
